name: grabcredit-bnpl
description: AI-powered BNPL eligibility engine for GrabOn, built with MCP + Claude + PayU LazyPay

scripts.setup: cd mcp-server && npm install && npm run build && cd ../web-app && npm install
scripts.dev: node -e "require('fs').existsSync('mcp-server/dist')||process.exit(1)" || npm run build:mcp && cd web-app && npm run dev
scripts.build:mcp: cd mcp-server && npm install && npm run build
scripts.typecheck: cd mcp-server && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../web-app && npx tsc --noEmit
